rules.nps_treatment: Directional improvement, not absolute threshold. Month-over-month gains toward 100.
rules.outcome_lag: Trailing 30-day window, updated weekly, 2-week attribution delay.
rules.ratchet_rule: Green floor rises 5%/week from 67.6 baseline. Week 5 = 86.3.
rules.onboarding_rule: New PMs or PMs with zero Jira data classified as Onboarding, not Red.
